subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness in the Most Great Prison that thou didst turn unto the Most Exalted Horizon and hearken unto the Call when it was raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم فی السجن الاعظم بانک اقبلت الی الافق الاعلی و سمعت الندآء اذ
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
